backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the incident management backend with CRUD operations — createIncident, addUpdate, changeStatus, deleteIncident, and getIncidents — storing incidents in an in-memory map with severity/status types.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the search/filter input and all associated filtering logic have been removed from Dashboard.tsx, with high confidence tied to test REQ-16.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend architecture and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light (`:root`) and dark (`.dark`) themes, including background, foreground, card, border, and chart color variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'District Status Page', mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the TypeScript entry point via a module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, and TanStack RouterProvider, defining routes for the Dashboard (`/`) and AdminPanel (`/admin`) under a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/AddUpdateForm.ts: React Hook Form-based form for appending a timestamped update message to a selected incident, using an incident selector dropdown that shows current status context before submission.
frontend/src/components/ChangeStatusForm: Form component for changing an incident's status, featuring an incident selector and a new-status dropdown with color-coded dot indicators, displaying the current status for context before submission.
frontend/src/components/CreateIncidentFo: A React form component for creating new incidents, using react-hook-form for validation, checking ID uniqueness before submission, and accepting fields for ID, title, description, affected service, and severity.
frontend/src/components/IncidentCard.tsx: A collapsible card component that displays incident details including severity, status, affected service, timestamps, description, and a sorted list of updates.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main application layout component providing a sticky header with navigation links, theme toggle, logout button, and a footer wrapping child content.
frontend/src/components/SeverityBadge.ts: A badge component that renders a color-coded, labeled badge with an animated dot indicator for incident severity levels (critical, major, minor, informational).
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: A badge component that renders a color-coded label for incident status values (investigating, identified, monitoring, resolved).
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A small button component that toggles between dark and light themes using the useTheme hook, displaying a sun or moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and persisted identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend incident operations: fetching all/single incidents, creating, updating, changing status, deleting, and checking ID uniqueness.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Wraps next-themes to expose the current resolved theme, a dark mode boolean, and a toggle function.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS that imports Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including status and severity colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin page gated behind Internet Identity authentication, providing tabbed forms to create incidents, add updates, change status, and delete resolved incidents.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Public dashboard page that fetches and displays all incidents split into active and resolved sections, with loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the theme with OKLCH CSS variable-based color tokens for UI, severity, status, sidebar, and charts, plus custom fonts, shadows, border radii, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state, version, architectural notes, known issues, and existing features for an internal IT status page dashboard with a public view and authenticated admin panel.
